SEARCH
Package DAL

Class TrainerDAL

java.lang.Object
DAL.TrainerDAL
public class TrainerDAL extends Object
Data Access Layer (DAL) class for performing CRUD operations on the Trainer table.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TrainerDAL(Connection connection)
    Constructor for RegionDAL.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    deleteTrainer(int trainerId)
    Deletes a trainer from the database if the trainer exists.
    List<Trainer>
    getAllTrainers()
    Retrieves all trainers from the Trainer table.
    String
    getTrainerClassById(int trainerId)
    Retrieves the trainer's class by their ID from the database.
    String
    getTrainerNameById(int trainerId)
    Retrieves the trainer's name by their ID from the database.
    boolean
    insertTrainer(Trainer trainer)
    Inserts a new trainer into the Trainer table.
    boolean
    trainerExists(int trainerId)
    Checks if a trainer exists in the database based on the trainerId.

  • Constructor Details

    • TrainerDAL

      public TrainerDAL(Connection connection)
      Constructor for RegionDAL.
      Parameters:
      connection - the database connection

  • Method Details

    • trainerExists

      public boolean trainerExists(int trainerId)
      Checks if a trainer exists in the database based on the trainerId.
      Parameters:
      trainerId - the trainer ID to check
      Returns:
      true if the trainer exists, false otherwise

    • insertTrainer

      public boolean insertTrainer(Trainer trainer) throws SQLException
      Inserts a new trainer into the Trainer table.
      Parameters:
      trainer - the trainer object containing trainer details
      Returns:
      true if the trainer was inserted, false otherwise
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs, including unique constraint violations

    • getAllTrainers

      public List<Trainer> getAllTrainers()
      Retrieves all trainers from the Trainer table.
      Returns:
      a list of Trainer objects

    • deleteTrainer

      public boolean deleteTrainer(int trainerId) throws SQLException
      Deletes a trainer from the database if the trainer exists.
      Parameters:
      trainerId - the ID of the trainer to delete
      Returns:
      true if the trainer was successfully deleted, false otherwise
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs, including inadequate permissions

    • getTrainerNameById

      public String getTrainerNameById(int trainerId)
      Retrieves the trainer's name by their ID from the database. Needed for confirmation in trainer deletion.
      Parameters:
      trainerId - the ID of the trainer
      Returns:
      the trainer's name, or null if no trainer is found

    • getTrainerClassById

      public String getTrainerClassById(int trainerId)
      Retrieves the trainer's class by their ID from the database. Needed for confirmation in trainer deletion.
      Parameters:
      trainerId - the ID of the trainer
      Returns:
      the trainer's class, or null if no trainer is found
